data.title: Major Japanese Chip Material Supplier Eyes Record-Breaking $3 Billion IPO—Japan's Largest Since SoftBank's 2018 Debut
data.description: JX Advanced Metals, a subsidiary of oil titan Eneos, is planning to raise an estimated ¥460 billion ($3 billion) through an initial public offering (IPO). This IPO is anticipated to be the largest in Japan since 2018.

data.title: Nasdaq-Listed VinFast Records Uptick In 2024 Deliveries But US Figures Unknown
data.description: Vietnamese EV maker VinFast Auto on Thursday reported a whopping 192% increase in EV sales worldwide to 97,399 units. However, very few EVs were sold in the U.S.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells Nearly $36 Million Worth Of Dialysis Giant DaVita's Shares Amid Q4 Earnings Beat
data.description: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has cut its stake in the dialysis provide DaVita Inc according to a U.S. SEC filing.

data.title: Brian Armstrong Wants To Handle Growing Volumes Of Memecoins By Adding DEXes Into Coinbase: 'A Little Bit Like The Early Days Of The Internet'
data.description: Brian Armstrong, the CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN), has voiced the necessity for a reevaluation of the company’s token listing process amid a surge in meme coin launches.
